title: virtual-mcp@1
description: Aggregates tools from multiple operations handlers ([mcp-server](mcp-server.json), [graphql-operations](graphql-operations.json), [xql](xql.json)) into a single MCP server. See [components](../components.md#virtual-mcp).

displayName.description: Human-readable display name for the virtual MCP server

dependencies.description: References to operations handlers: mcp-server@1, graphql-operations@1, xql@1.
